name: slider
title: Slider
description: Single or dual thumb scrubber for continuous or stepped values.

api.description: Single or dual thumb scrubber with bar or line chrome, horizontal or vertical orientation, and optional label, leading icon, and value readout. Without marks, the thumb tracks the pointer smoothly while dragging and commits to step. With marks, the value snaps to the nearest mark.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value.

props.name: step
props.description: Increment between committed values when marks are omitted. Values of 0 or less fall back to 1. With marks, step still controls readout precision unless formatValue is set.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value. One entry is a single thumb. Two entries enable a range with minimum and maximum thumbs. Values are snapped to step, ordered low to high, and clamped.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value. Pass two numbers for a range slider.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when a committed value changes. Receives one or two stepped values.

props.name: variant
props.description: Track chrome. bar is a filled pill track. line is a thin mute rail with a thicker active segment and circular thumbs.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Track direction. vertical places the minimum at the bottom and stacks the range readout under the track.

props.name: thickness
props.description: Track and thumb thickness. sm is fine, md is the default, lg is a thick rail. Remaps the slider thickness tokens on the root. Style overrides of those variables still win.

props.name: minStepsBetween
props.description: Minimum gap between thumbs in range mode, measured in steps (value gap is minStepsBetween times step). With marks, the gap is counted in mark indices. Use with description to explain the constraint.

props.name: marks
props.description: Discrete snap stops. When set, dragging and keyboard move between marks only. Labels render beside a vertical track or under a horizontal track. Omit label to show the formatted value. Prefer a stable array reference.

props.name: valuePosition
props.description: Where the label and value chrome sit. header is above the track. footer is below the track with the same label and value row. start places both beside the track at the start. end places both at the end. ends puts the label at the start and the value at the end, with the track between them. ends-reverse flips that (value at the start, label at the end). auto uses thumb for a vertical marked single thumb, footer for other vertical sliders, and header for horizontal. thumb is vertical single-thumb only; on horizontal or range it falls back to header. thumbs places a formatted value under each thumb and keeps label, leading, and description in the header. bubble floats a tooltip on a single thumb and keeps label, leading, and description in the header.

props.name: thumbValueOrder
props.description: Stack order for traveling thumb meta when valuePosition is thumb. label-first puts the label above the value. value-first puts the value above the label.

props.name: marksSide
props.description: Which side mark labels sit on for a vertical slider. end keeps marks on the right and thumb meta on the left. start swaps them. Ignored for horizontal marks, which stay under the track.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional heading. In the header by default. For vertical marked sliders it travels with the thumb when valuePosition is thumb or auto.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional supporting line under the label. Omit it to hide the copy while keeping constraints such as minStepsBetween.

props.name: leading
props.description: Optional leading content before the label, such as an icon. Travels with the thumb when valuePosition is thumb.

props.name: showStepButtons
props.description: Show outline icon buttons that decrease and increase the active thumb. Distance per click follows stepButtonSteps. Keyboard arrows still move one step. In range mode, buttons follow the last focused or dragged thumb.

props.name: stepButtonSteps
props.description: How many step increments each step button applies. With step 1, 5 moves by 5. With marks, hops that many mark stops. Does not change keyboard step size. Values below 1 are treated as 1.

props.name: showValue
props.description: Show the value slot. Defaults to true when label, description, leading, valueSlot, formatValue, or formatValues is set. Set false to keep a label without a readout. Placement follows valuePosition.

props.name: valueFormat
props.description: Built in readout format when valueSlot, formatValue, and formatValues are omitted. number uses step precision. percent shows position across min to max.

props.name: valueSlot
props.description: Custom value slot for header, footer, start, end, ends, ends-reverse, and thumb chrome. Replaces the default readout with any node, such as a Badge or counter. Pass a render function to receive the current values and keep the slot in sync. Does not replace per-thumb thumbs or bubble readouts. Overrides formatValues, formatValue, and valueFormat for display. Keyboard and aria valuetext still use formatValue or valueFormat.

props.name: formatValue
props.description: Formats each thumb value for the default readout, per-thumb thumbs and bubble text, and aria valuetext. Overrides valueFormat. Ignored for chrome display when valueSlot is set.

props.name: formatValues
props.description: Custom readout for the full value array when valueSlot is omitted. String and number results keep the default value typography. Other React nodes are treated as custom slot content. Prefer valueSlot for a dedicated Badge or counter.

props.name: scrubSound
props.description: Play a smooth scrub tone while dragging a thumb with the pointer. Pitch follows position and level follows drag speed. Off by default. Stops on release, unmount, or when the document is hidden. Skipped when reduced motion is preferred. Separate from the Tick Slider step tick.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Blocks pointer, keyboard, marks, and step buttons for every variant and layout.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible name. For a range, each thumb appends Minimum or Maximum.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of a labeling element. Defaults to the label element when label is set.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the root.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles on the root. Can also override Slider CSS variables directly.

props.name: ref
props.description: Ref to the root element.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: thickness remaps track, line, and thumb variables to the sm or lg companions. variant line uses the line thickness tokens. valuePosition bubble uses the bubble tokens and reserves clearance on the rail or control. valuePosition start, end, ends, and ends-reverse place chrome in a track row beside the rail using --df-slider-step-gap. orientation vertical uses --df-slider-vertical-size for track length and --df-slider-vertical-column-gap between meta, track, and marks. Horizontal marks use --df-slider-marks-gap. Prop and style overrides still win.

props.name: --primary
props.description: Active fill (both variants) and bar thumb border.

props.name: --foreground
props.description: Label text, leading icon, and line thumb border.

props.name: --muted
props.description: Bar track background.

props.name: --muted-foreground
props.description: Value readout text.

props.name: --background
props.description: Thumb fill.

props.name: --df-slider-track-height
props.description: Bar track thickness for thickness md.

props.name: --df-slider-line-track-height
props.description: Line mute rail thickness for thickness md.

props.name: --df-slider-line-range-height
props.description: Line active segment thickness for thickness md.

props.name: --df-slider-line-track-bg
props.description: Mute rail fill for the line variant.

props.name: --df-slider-thumb-size
props.description: Thumb size for thickness md.

props.name: --df-slider-track-height-sm
props.description: Bar track thickness for thickness sm.

props.name: --df-slider-line-track-height-sm
props.description: Line mute rail thickness for thickness sm.

props.name: --df-slider-line-range-height-sm
props.description: Line active segment thickness for thickness sm.

props.name: --df-slider-thumb-size-sm
props.description: Thumb size for thickness sm.

props.name: --df-slider-track-height-lg
props.description: Bar track thickness for thickness lg.

props.name: --df-slider-line-track-height-lg
props.description: Line mute rail thickness for thickness lg.

props.name: --df-slider-line-range-height-lg
props.description: Line active segment thickness for thickness lg.

props.name: --df-slider-thumb-size-lg
props.description: Thumb size for thickness lg.

props.name: --df-slider-vertical-size
props.description: Vertical track length.

props.name: --df-slider-marks-gap
props.description: Gap between the horizontal track and the marks row.

props.name: --df-slider-vertical-column-gap
props.description: Gap between thumb meta, the vertical track, and mark labels.

props.name: --df-slider-marks-track-height
props.description: Height of the horizontal marks row.

props.name: --df-slider-vertical-marks-min-width
props.description: Minimum width of the vertical marks column.

props.name: --df-slider-bubble-pad-inline
props.description: Horizontal padding inside the value bubble.

props.name: --df-slider-bubble-pad-block
props.description: Vertical padding inside the value bubble.

props.name: --df-slider-bubble-offset
props.description: Gap between the thumb and the value bubble.

props.name: --df-slider-bubble-radius
props.description: Corner radius of the value bubble.

props.name: --df-slider-bubble-clearance
props.description: Space reserved above or beside the track for the value bubble. Scales with thumb size, bubble padding, and type size.

props.name: --df-slider-thumb-value-clearance
props.description: Height reserved under a horizontal track for per-thumb values.

props.name: --df-slider-thumb-value-column
props.description: Width reserved beside a vertical track for per-thumb values.

props.name: --df-slider-thumb-value-gap
props.description: Gap between the track and per-thumb values.

props.name: --df-slider-step-gap
props.description: Gap between step buttons and the track.

props.name: --df-slider-header-gap
props.description: Gap between header, track, and footer.

props.name: --df-slider-header-inline-gap
props.description: Gap between the heading block and the header value.

props.name: --df-slider-tight-gap
props.description: Tight stack gap for heading block, value stack, and thumb meta.

props.name: --df-slider-value-sep-mix
props.description: Mix amount for the range separator against muted foreground.

props.name: --df-slider-label-gap
props.description: Gap between leading content and the label.

props.name: --df-slider-leading-size
props.description: Leading icon box size.
